name: Impossible Banana Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 9-inch pie plate.
2. In a blender, combine milk, melted margarine, vanilla, eggs, sugar, and Bisquick. Blend for 30 seconds.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie plate.
4. Bake for about 30 minutes.
5. Arrange sliced bananas on top of the baked filling.
6. Beat whipping cream and confectioners' sugar until stiff peaks form.
7. Spread the whipped topping over the bananas, covering them completely.
8. Serve immediately after baking and just before adding the whipped cream.
